author: y4rr
content: Landed in 925e831b. ferrotorch-llama crate with LlamaConfig, LlamaAttention, LlamaMLP, LlamaDecoderLayer, LlamaModel, LlamaForCausalLM. HF weight names map 1:1 onto our parameter paths. 11 tests pass including full state_dict round-trip producing byte-identical logits. Scope is batch=1 inference; multi-batch needs 4-D reshape helpers (follow-up).
